Job_Summary: Report to Senior Content Director, own performance creative and copy strategy, shape creative output across multidisciplinary teams. Work with Content & Creative teams at a global digital agency with offices across the US, Europe, and South Africa. 60% remote flexibility with flexible hours.
Score_Rationale: Excellent skills match for creative strategy and brand work at a major agency. Senior level with strong salary (€93K-111K). Hybrid with European offices, though not Lisbon-specific.

Job_Summary: Shape strategic direction for brands across industries. Lead strategic engagements defining marketing visions, positioning, and go-to-market approaches. Translate business goals and audience insights into inspiring briefs and frameworks. Fully remote company with 700+ team across 60+ countries.
Score_Rationale: Fully remote global role at leading creative services company. Brand positioning, strategic frameworks, and creative direction align well with Rosalind's experience. B2B SaaS client focus is slightly adjacent.

Job_Summary: Full-stack marketing manager for portfolio of D2C brands generating $20M+ annually. Own projects from conception to execution across digital ads, email marketing, and partnerships. 100% Remote EU with EET timezone alignment. Portugal is an eligible country.
Score_Rationale: Perfect location fit (Remote EU, Portugal eligible) and ideal D2C industry. Marketing scope is broader than pure brand strategy, but Rosalind's D2C experience at Undandy and Bond Touch is directly relevant.

Job_Summary: Work with Content & Creative teams, lead social strategy and shape creative output across teams. Create strategies that celebrate diversity and push industry-leading thinking. 60% remote working flexibility with flexible hours between 8am-6:30pm.
Score_Rationale: Good creative strategy role at global digital agency with European presence. Social strategy focus plays to Rosalind's content and community experience. May be positioned below her 8+ years seniority.

Job_Summary: Lead centralized Strategic Insights team within Brand & Innovation function. Form and lead customer, market, and competitor insights team. Refresh ICP, segmentation, and strategic customer understanding. Reports to Senior Director of Brand & Innovation.
Score_Rationale: Exceptional location fit with Lisbon office and remote in 35 countries. Head-level role in Brand & Innovation aligns with insight-led research skills. Less creative direction focus than ideal; FinTech sector is adjacent.

Job_Summary: Run creative department for Europe's biggest pre-loved fashion marketplace (34M members, 13 countries). Oversee creative consistency across 13+ markets, develop advertising concepts, shape tone of voice. Report to Brand Director, manage team of copywriters.
Score_Rationale: Excellent skills and industry match for creative direction at major European consumer marketplace. €5,785+/month (~€69K+/year). Location in Vilnius/Berlin/Prague/Utrecht without confirmed Lisbon remote is the main drawback.
